diagrams.title: Energy Consumption Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing four levels of energy optimization from hardware to user behavior
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the cascade of energy optimization techniques at each computing layer

diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Diagram
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing how PUE is calculated from total facility energy divided by IT equipment energy
elements: Total Facility Energy (Cooling + Lighting + IT + Losses)
diagrams.purpose: Understand data center energy efficiency measurement

diagrams.title: DVFS Power Curve
diagrams.description: Graph showing relationship between CPU frequency, voltage, and power consumption
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how voltage scaling affects power consumption non-linearly

diagrams.title: Virtualization Architecture
diagrams.description: Diagram showing one physical server hosting multiple virtual machines
diagrams.purpose: Understand how virtualization consolidates workloads to save energy
